panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of this subsystem.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows operating cost behavior for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows light availability or daily light integral behavior.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current alerts relevant to this dashboard context.

panels.title: Controller State History (Temp / Humidity)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts),
  CASE
    WHEN value LIKE 'HEAT\_S1%' THEN 'HEAT_S1'
    WHEN value LIKE 'HEAT\_S2%' THEN 'HEAT_S2'
    WHEN value LIKE 'COOL\_S1%' THEN 'COOL_S1'
    WHEN value LIKE 'COOL\_S2%' THEN 'COOL_S2'
    WHEN value LIKE 'COOL\_S3%' THEN 'COOL_S3'
    WHEN value LIKE 'TEMP\_IDLE%' THEN 'IDLE'
    ELSE value
  END AS "Temperature"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts),
  CASE
    WHEN value LIKE '%HUMID\_S2' THEN 'HUMID_S2'
    WHEN value LIKE '%HUMID\_S1' THEN 'HUMID_S1'
    WHEN value LIKE '%DEHUM\_V1' THEN 'DEHUM_V1'
    WHEN value LIKE '%DEHUM\_V2' THEN 'DEHUM_V2'
    WHEN value LIKE '%DEHUM\_HEAT' THEN 'DEHUM_HEAT'
    WHEN value LIKE '%HUM\_IDLE' THEN 'IDLE'
    ELSE value
  END AS "Humidity"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows the controller state history across the temperature and humidity axes. Useful for understanding how the state machine moved through conditions over time and why it matters operationally.

panels.title: Temperature vs Setpoints

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Control Temperature Input

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_control AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_control IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_control AS "VPD Control"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_control IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(es.ts),
  (SELECT c2.vpd_avg FROM climate c2 WHERE c2.ts <= es.ts ORDER BY c2.ts DESC LIMIT 1)
  - (SELECT c3.vpd_avg FROM climate c3 WHERE c3.ts <= es.ts - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY c3.ts DESC LIMIT 1)
  AS "VPD Change During Fog"
FROM equipment_state es
WHERE es.equipment = 'fog' AND es.state = false AND $__timeFilter(es.ts)
ORDER BY es.ts

SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_fog_min AS "value"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz) AND runtime_fog_min IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY date

SELECT $__time(ts), enthalpy_delta AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND enthalpy_delta IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Vent Bypass"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'vent_bypass_active' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Economiser Blocked"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'economiser_blocked' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "heat_min_on_s" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'heat_min_on_s' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "fan_min_on_s" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'fan_min_on_s' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "heat_min_off_s" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'heat_min_off_s' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Time"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Forecast Outdoor Temperature (48h)
panels.description: Upcoming outdoor temps to anticipate heating/cooling demand

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_f AS "Forecast Temp (°F)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Actual Outdoor (°F)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Forecast Solar Radiation (48h)
panels.description: Upcoming solar radiation — high values mean passive heating, less need for heaters

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_w_m2 AS "Forecast Solar (W/m²)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Plan Accuracy (Recent)

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan_id, waypoints, achieved, accuracy_pct, mean_abs_error FROM v_plan_accuracy ORDER BY plan_start DESC LIMIT 5

panels.description: Shows planning behavior, compliance, or planning outcomes over time.

panels.title: State Durations Today

targets.rawSql: SELECT state, hours, transitions FROM v_state_durations WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY hours DESC

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: VPD vs Setpoints

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 hour', ts, start => $__timeFrom(), finish => now()) AS time, locf(last(value, ts)) AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND value > 0 AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket_gapfill('1 hour', ts, start => $__timeFrom(), finish => now()) AS time, locf(last(value, ts)) AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit over time, one of the most important plant-stress signals in the greenhouse.

panels.title: Enthalpy Delta (Outdoor − Indoor)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), enthalpy_delta AS "ΔH (kJ/kg)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND enthalpy_delta IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows whether outside air is thermodynamically better or worse than indoor air for vent-based dehumidification and economiser decisions.

panels.title: Economiser Activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END AS "Vent" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'Blocked' ELSE 'Available' END AS "Economiser" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'economiser_blocked' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows when the economiser logic is allowing or blocking vent-based dehumidification.

panels.title: Relay Cycle Durations

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM lead(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY equipment ORDER BY ts) - ts)::numeric AS "Duration (s)", equipment AS metric
FROM equipment_state WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND state = true AND equipment IN ('fan1','fan2','heat1','heat2','fog','vent') ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows how long major relay-driven devices stay on per cycle, useful for spotting short-cycling or unstable control.

panels.title: Short-Cycle Violations (<min on/off time)

targets.rawSql:
WITH cycles AS (
    SELECT equipment, ts, state,
        lead(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY equipment ORDER BY ts) AS next_ts,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM lead(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY equipment ORDER BY ts) - ts) AS duration_s
    FROM equipment_state
    WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND equipment IN ('fan1','fan2','heat1','heat2','fog','vent')
)
SELECT to_char(ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Time",
    equipment AS "Equipment",
    CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "State",
    ROUND(duration_s::numeric, 0) AS "Duration (s)",
    CASE
        WHEN equipment LIKE 'heat%' AND state AND duration_s < 120 THEN 'VIOLATION'
        WHEN equipment LIKE 'fan%' AND state AND duration_s < 120 THEN 'VIOLATION'
        WHEN equipment = 'fog' AND state AND duration_s < 60 THEN 'VIOLATION'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS "Check"
FROM cycles
WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL AND (
    (equipment LIKE 'heat%' AND state AND duration_s < 120) OR
    (equipment LIKE 'fan%' AND state AND duration_s < 120) OR
    (equipment = 'fog' AND state AND duration_s < 60)
)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Shows violations of minimum on/off timing rules that protect equipment from excessive cycling.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.ts AS time, c.temp_avg AS "Indoor Avg Temp" FROM climate c WHERE c.ts >= '2026-03-25 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND c.ts < '2026-03-26 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz ORDER BY 1
SELECT w.ts AS time, w.temp_f AS "Outdoor Temp" FROM weather_station w WHERE w.ts >= '2026-03-25 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND w.ts < '2026-03-26 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz ORDER BY 1
SELECT c.ts AS time, c.vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM climate c WHERE c.ts >= '2026-03-25 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND c.ts < '2026-03-26 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz ORDER BY 1

SELECT e.ts AS time, CASE WHEN e.state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Fog On" FROM equipment_state e WHERE e.ts >= '2026-03-25 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND e.ts < '2026-03-26 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND e.equipment='fog' ORDER BY 1

SELECT e.ts AS time, CASE WHEN e.state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Any Mister On" FROM equipment_state e WHERE e.ts >= '2026-03-25 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND e.ts < '2026-03-26 00:00:00-06'::timestamptz AND e.equipment IN ('mister_south','mister_west','mister_center') ORDER BY 1

panels.title: March 25 — One Bad Day: Temp, VPD, Fog, and Misters
panels.description: Representative stress day showing outdoor heat, indoor heat, VPD pressure, and the system response. This is the clearest single-day proof of the greenhouse control problem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.ts AS time, f.temp_f AS "Forecast Outdoor Temp" FROM weather_forecast f WHERE f.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' AND f.ts < now() + interval '24 hours' ORDER BY 1
SELECT c.ts AS time, c.temp_avg AS "Actual Indoor Temp" FROM climate c WHERE c.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' ORDER BY 1
SELECT sp.ts AS time, sp.value AS "Planned temp_high" FROM setpoint_plan sp WHERE sp.parameter='temp_high' AND sp.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Temperature Story — Forecast vs Planned vs Actual
panels.description: Forecast, planned temperature posture, and actual indoor outcome over the same window. Useful for showing whether planning is anticipatory or reactive.

targets.rawSql: SELECT f.ts AS time, f.vpd_kpa AS "Forecast Outdoor VPD" FROM weather_forecast f WHERE f.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' AND f.ts < now() + interval '24 hours' ORDER BY 1
SELECT c.ts AS time, c.vpd_avg AS "Actual Indoor VPD" FROM climate c WHERE c.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' ORDER BY 1
SELECT sp.ts AS time, sp.value AS "Planned vpd_high" FROM setpoint_plan sp WHERE sp.parameter='vpd_high' AND sp.ts > now() - interval '72 hours' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: VPD Story — Forecast vs Planned vs Actual
panels.description: Forecast dry-air pressure, planned VPD ceiling posture, and actual indoor VPD over time.
